initial_candidates.sql:
WITH employee_order_stats AS (
    SELECT 
        e.employeeid,
        COUNT(*) AS total_orders,
        COUNT(CASE WHEN o.shippeddate >= o.requireddate THEN 1 END) AS late_orders,
        ROUND(100.0 * COUNT(CASE WHEN o.shippeddate >= o.requireddate THEN 1 END) / COUNT(*), 2) AS late_percentage
    FROM employees e
    JOIN orders o ON e.employeeid = o.employeeid
    GROUP BY e.employeeid
    HAVING COUNT(*) > 50
)
SELECT 
    employeeid,
    late_orders,
    late_percentage
FROM employee_order_stats
ORDER BY late_percentage DESC
LIMIT 3;

WITH employee_order_stats AS (
    SELECT 
        e.employeeid,
        COUNT(*) AS total_orders,
        COUNT(CASE WHEN o.shippeddate >= o.requireddate THEN 1 END) AS late_orders
    FROM employees e
    INNER JOIN orders o ON e.employeeid = o.employeeid
    GROUP BY e.employeeid
    HAVING COUNT(*) > 50
)
SELECT 
    employeeid,
    late_orders,
    ROUND(100.0 * late_orders / total_orders, 2) AS late_percentage
FROM employee_order_stats
ORDER BY late_percentage DESC
LIMIT 3;

SELECT 
    employees.employeeid,
    COUNT(CASE WHEN orders.shippeddate >= orders.requireddate THEN 1 END) AS late_orders,
    ROUND(100.0 * COUNT(CASE WHEN orders.shippeddate >= orders.requireddate THEN 1 END) / COUNT(*), 2) AS late_percentage
FROM 
    employees
JOIN 
    orders ON employees.employeeid = orders.employeeid
GROUP BY 
    employees.employeeid
HAVING 
    COUNT(*) > 50
ORDER BY 
    late_percentage DESC
LIMIT 3;

SELECT 
    e.employeeid,
    COUNT(CASE WHEN o.shippeddate >= o.requireddate THEN 1 END) AS late_orders,
    ROUND(COUNT(CASE WHEN o.shippeddate >= o.requireddate THEN 1 END) * 100.0 / COUNT(*), 2) AS late_percentage
FROM 
    employees e
JOIN 
    orders o ON e.employeeid = o.employeeid
GROUP BY 
    e.employeeid
HAVING 
    COUNT(*) > 50
ORDER BY 
    late_percentage DESC
LIMIT 3;

WITH employee_order_stats AS (
    SELECT 
        e.employeeid,
        COUNT(*) AS total_orders,
        COUNT(CASE WHEN o.shippeddate >= o.requireddate THEN 1 END) AS late_orders,
        ROUND(CAST(COUNT(CASE WHEN o.shippeddate >= o.requireddate THEN 1 END) AS REAL) * 100 / COUNT(*), 2) AS late_percentage
    FROM employees e
    JOIN orders o ON e.employeeid = o.employeeid
    GROUP BY e.employeeid
    HAVING COUNT(*) > 50
)
SELECT 
    employeeid,
    late_orders,
    late_percentage
FROM employee_order_stats
ORDER BY late_percentage DESC
LIMIT 3;

aggregation.selected_sql:
SELECT 
    e.employeeid,
    COUNT(CASE WHEN o.shippeddate >= o.requireddate THEN 1 END) AS late_orders,
    ROUND(COUNT(CASE WHEN o.shippeddate >= o.requireddate THEN 1 END) * 100.0 / COUNT(*), 2) AS late_percentage
FROM 
    employees e
JOIN 
    orders o ON e.employeeid = o.employeeid
GROUP BY 
    e.employeeid
HAVING 
    COUNT(*) > 50
ORDER BY 
    late_percentage DESC
LIMIT 3;
